errors.evidence: The plan in span '5350902b102e7cfb' (llm.output_messages.0.message.content) explicitly states: 'Step 1: Use the inspect_file_as_text tool to read the contents of the attached JSON-LD file (data/gaia/validation/bec74516-02fc-48dc-b202-55e78d0e17cf.jsonld)'. However, the tool definition (smolagents.tools_names attribute of span 'd87bc77ea8294290') for 'inspect_file_as_text' clearly states: 'This tool handles the following file extensions: [...], and all other types of text files. IT DOES NOT HANDLE IMAGES.' and '.jsonld' is not in the supported list. The subsequent execution in span 'edc133ddc704966d' results in 'UnsupportedFormatException: Could not convert [...] .jsonld to Markdown. The formats ['.jsonld'] are not supported.'
errors.description: The agent selected the 'inspect_file_as_text' tool to process a '.jsonld' file, even though
